title: Walk in Circles
description: Learn how loops can repeat actions! Make your character move multiple times automatically.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Welcome to loops! This is where programming gets REALLY powerful!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Kind of! Loops let us repeat actions without typing them over and over!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Imagine you want to print 'hello' 5 times. Without loops, you'd write:

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: That's so much typing! There must be a better way!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: There is! With a loop, we can do it in just 2 lines!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: A 'for' loop repeats code a certain number of times. Watch this!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now add the code to repeat. Remember the indent!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: That's it! This will print 'hello' exactly 5 times!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Click play and watch the loop repeat!

objectives.description: Click play to run your loop

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Wow! It printed 'hello' 5 times from just 2 lines!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: That's the power of loops! Now let's use the loop variable 'i'!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The variable 'i' changes each time the loop runs. Let's see it!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content:
Clear your code and type:
for i in range(5):

objectives.description: Type: print(i) to see the numbers

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Click play to see what 'i' becomes each time!

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: It printed 0, 1, 2, 3, 4! The 'i' changes each time!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! range(5) gives us 5 numbers starting from 0. Great job!
